title: イクノ式マネジメント論

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Ikuno Dictus talking with a fellow student
at the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Ergo, it would be best for you to reduce the
number of exercises in your afternoon training
session by one.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I see! That'll definitely work! Thank you, Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: No need to thank me. I'm happy to be of service.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The younger Umamusume gives Ikuno Dictus a
deep bow and walks away.
choice_data_list: What were you two talking about?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: She wanted me to look over her training schedule.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm quite good at schedule creation and
management, you see.
choice_data_list: Can you go over mine too?
Can you go over mine too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm quite good at schedule creation and
management, you see.
choice_data_list: Can you go over mine too?
Can you go over mine too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You want me to look at your schedule too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But as a trainer, you must have already learned
about schedule management. There shouldn't be
a need for me to examine it at all.
choice_data_list: I'd just like your opinion is all.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm... Very well. I'll take a look at it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...You've included too many activities for this
day.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And while I understand you're busy, you must find
time to eat, sleep, and rest.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Your body is an invaluable asset, even if you
don't use it for racing like us. You should ensure
you are never lacking in nutrition, sleep, or rest.
choice_data_list: Thanks. I'll keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: No need for thanks. I'm merely glad to be of help.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Now, on to my next point...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even halfway through my comments. I
cannot simply let you get away with this
ridiculous schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus proceeds to point out each and
every flaw in my schedule...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Tips? Well, if it's one thing I would advise, it
would be not to believe everything you read.
choice_data_list: Do you have a specific example?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Nine times out of ten, the benefits of a
routine are what is emphasized.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Often do I read that running a lot is the key to
strengthen one's legs.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
However, in most cases, schedules do not account
for the fatigue that is brought on by exercise.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's all I wanted to point out. I don't know if it
can be considered a tip, but I hope it helps.
choice_data_list:
Thanks. I'll be careful not to believe everything
I read.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Good. That is wise of you.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Except everything I just said was a lie.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm joking. What I told you was all true.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems you need more practice in
being less gullible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus's stoicism belies a hidden and
unexpected sense of humor. It'll take a great deal
of practice to tell when she's joking.
